title: A Japanese Tragedy
actors: Yûko Mochizuki, Yôko Katsuragi, Masami Taura
plot: Alternating in time, between the end of World War II and 1953, Haruko, a widow, does what she can to keep her daughter Utako and son Seiichi safe, fed, and sheltered. By 1953, it's clear that the children, as they enter adulthood,...
